html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman

The Glove of Challenge is the Item that must be given to Cozy Bunnymen in order to challenge them to the Pillow Fight Pit.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Glove of Challenge
"Tell a Bunnyman you'd like to try your hand at a pillow battle."
Crafting
×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"yotr_token"
“I should be careful who I hand this out to.”
–Wilson
“I'm gonna go slap the biggest rabbit I can find!”
–Willow
“Who will face mighty Wolfgang in pillow fight?”
–Wolfgang
“A duel to the death might help pass the time.”
–Wendy
“VIOLENCE INITIATOR”
–WX-78
“Traditionally, being struck with a glove implies a challenge to a duel.”
–Wickerbottom
“It doesn't feel polite to smack someone with a glove...”
–Woodie
“Care for a gentleman's duel?”
–Maxwell
“Whö dares tö face me in the ring?”
–Wigfrid
“We shouldn't start fights... but do pillow fights count?”
–Webber
“Surely we can settle this without violence?”
–Warly
“For hitting? Oh no...”
–Wormwood
“This'll get those layabouts off their fuzzy tushes!”
–Winona
“A duel, a duel! To arms!”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee-hee... SMACK!”
–Wurt
“It's rude to hit people with gloves. You might start a fight!”
–Walter
“I demand satisfaction!”
–Wanda
The Glove of Challenge is the Item that must be given to Cozy Bunnymen in order to challenge them to the Pillow Fight Pit.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Găng tay Thử thách là Vật phẩm phải được trao cho Thỏ con ấm cúng để thách đấu họ trong Hố đấu gối.
title: Glove of Challenge
